botwatch_kofi_dashboard_snapshot_2026_06.note: Investigator BotWatch Ko-fi Donors dashboard, not operator-published. Min floor ($322) uses tier minimums on each event; public kofi-cumulative-bands.json floor ($1177 Jun) uses creator-dashboard exact amounts on the Jun 14 cluster. Both are valid lower-bound scenarios.

ascendant_infra_estimate_note: Generous investigator estimate for probe-confirmed infrastructure only: OVH website/CDN, 24/7 home-server electricity, marginal residential ISP uplift. Excludes operator labor, dev tooling, eqemulator.dev login OVH Canada, and hardware replacement capex. Total operation including labor could meet or exceed the public ~$411/mo runway rate; the transparency gap is that Ko-fi presents that figure as hosting/infrastructure burn without category split.
author_belvue_vps_note: OVH US VPS, yearly promo invoice ~$50; author-stated. Public: static TLS site only. Comparison baseline for ch 11 web-edge cost only, not game hosting.
note: Sum on-demand Cost column plus Included Total Tokens at $8.0/1M tokens (retail-equivalent; not actual invoice).

cursor_api_parse.method: Sum on-demand Cost column plus Included Total Tokens at $8.0/1M tokens (retail-equivalent; not actual invoice).
